text:
The title appears in a reference list but the arXiv ID 2506.07218 points to a different paper. Let me verify the actual paper at that arXiv ID.
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The arXiv ID 2506.07218 belongs to a real paper titled "Perception-R1: Advancing Multimodal Reasoning Capabilities of MLLMs via Visual Perception Reward" by Tong Xiao et al. — completely different title and completely different authors from those cited (Wen Xiao, Weijie Zhang, Jie Hu, Rui Chen, Jie Yang). No paper with the exact cited title exists in any academic database or on the web; it only appears as a citation in another paper's reference list, pointing to the wrong arXiv ID.
LINK: NONE
